Grow Your Business with High-Intent Buyers

Join Nigeria's smartest gifting ecosystem. We use AI to match shoppers with your curated gifts, hampers, and experiences. Focus on creating—we bring the sales.

The Storefront

How It Works for Vendors

Three simple steps to scale your gifting brand

Step 1

Create Your Store

Sign up and upload your gifts, hampers, and services. Set your pricing and availability easily.

Step 2

Receive AI Matches

Our AI engine recommends your products to users based on their budget and recipient profile.

Step 3

Fulfill & Get Paid

Accept orders, package beautifully, and get paid instantly directly into your bank account.

✨ AI-Powered

Let Our AI Find Your Perfect Buyer

No more struggling with marketing or ads. Our GiftGenius AI analyzes user requests and actively recommends your products when they are the perfect match for the occasion and budget.

  • Zero marketing spend required—the AI finds the buyers for you
  • Matches based on exact recipient profiles (age, occasion, relation)
  • High conversion rates because buyers are matched with exactly what they want
  • Automated inventory and order management
Create Vendor Profile

"Looking for a corporate appreciation gift under ₦50,000. Needs to feel premium with some luxury snacks."
